description_long: This is a mid-top outdoor shoe featuring a combination of tan and brown synthetic mesh and suede-like materials. The upper is constructed with a breathable mesh fabric, reinforced by brown overlays around the toe, heel, and lace area for added durability and structure. The shoe is equipped with a rugged, black rubber outsole with deep treads, designed for enhanced grip and traction on urban and natural surfaces. The lacing system uses round brown laces threaded through metal eyelets and fabric loops, providing a secure fit. The interior appears padded for comfort, and a pull tab is present at the heel for easy wearing. The overall design suggests a focus on both style and functionality, suitable for urban exploration or light hiking.
description: A tan and brown mid-top outdoor shoe with a rugged black sole, mesh upper, and reinforced overlays, designed for comfort and durability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan mesh upper, brown overlays, and the full length of the rugged black sole.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the rounded toe, lacing system, and mesh texture.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the brown heel overlay and the curvature of the sole.
description_view_3: Rear angled view displaying the padded heel, pull tab, and heel structure.
